sections.title: Each question
sections.quote:
"Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving."
-Albert Einstein

sections.title: Let's find out
sections.quote:
"Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known."
-Carl Sagan

questions.text: I feel energized after interacting with many people.
I prefer spending time alone to recharge my energy.
I focus more on real facts and specific details than on abstract ideas or possibilities.
I enjoy thinking about big ideas and seeing the big picture rather than small details.
When making decisions, I rely on logic and objectivity.
I consider personal values and emotions when making decisions.
I like to plan things well in advance and stick to the plan.
I prefer flexibility and adapting to situations as they unfold.
I enjoy being in the middle of crowds and social activities.
I often trust my gut feelings over things that can be directly observed.
I feel uneasy when things are not neat or well-organized
I think it's important to maintain harmony and avoid conflict in relationships.

INTJ.title: Architect
INTJ.subtitle: Strategic. Independent. Visionary.
INTJ.description: As an INTJ (Architect), you're a master planner and a true problem solver. You see the world as a system to be analyzed, improved, and optimized. With sharp logical thinking and a long-term mindset, you don't just see what is you imagine what could be.

INTP.title: Logician
INTP.subtitle: Innovative. Analytical. Curious.
INTP.description: As an INTP (Logician), you're driven by a thirst for knowledge and understanding. You excel at finding patterns and solving complex problems with creative solutions.

ENTJ.title: Commander
ENTJ.subtitle: Bold. Strategic. Leadership.
ENTJ.description: As an ENTJ (Commander), you're a natural-born leader with the ability to inspire and direct others toward achieving ambitious goals.

ENTP.title: Debater
ENTP.subtitle: Quick. Clever. Innovative.
ENTP.description: As an ENTP (Debater), you're intellectually curious and love exploring new ideas through debate and discussion.

INFJ.title: Advocate
INFJ.subtitle: Insightful. Principled. Idealistic.
INFJ.description: As an INFJ (Advocate), you seek meaning and connection, driven by deeply held values and a desire to help others.

INFP.title: Mediator
INFP.subtitle: Idealistic. Empathetic. Creative.
INFP.description: As an INFP (Mediator), you're guided by your values and imagination, always seeking to understand yourself and help others.

ENFJ.title: Protagonist
ENFJ.subtitle: Charismatic. Inspiring. Altruistic.
ENFJ.description: As an ENFJ (Protagonist), you're a natural motivator who inspires others to grow and reach their potential.

ENFP.title: Campaigner
ENFP.subtitle: Enthusiastic. Creative. Sociable.
ENFP.description: As an ENFP (Campaigner), you're a free spirit who sees life as full of possibilities and connections to explore.

ISTJ.title: Logistician
ISTJ.subtitle: Practical. Fact-minded. Reliable.
ISTJ.description: As an ISTJ (Logistician), you take pride in your integrity and dedication to doing what's right.

ISFJ.title: Defender
ISFJ.subtitle: Dedicated. Warm. Protective.
ISFJ.description: As an ISFJ (Defender), you're devoted to protecting and caring for the people you love.

ESTJ.title: Executive
ESTJ.subtitle: Organized. Traditional. Administrator.
ESTJ.description: As an ESTJ (Executive), you excel at managing people and bringing order to achieve goals.

ESFJ.title: Consul
ESFJ.subtitle: Caring. Social. Popular.
ESFJ.description: As an ESFJ (Consul), you're eager to help others and bring people together in harmony.

ISTP.title: Virtuoso
ISTP.subtitle: Bold. Practical. Experimental.
ISTP.description: As an ISTP (Virtuoso), you're a master at exploring the world through your hands and your senses.

ISFP.title: Adventurer
ISFP.subtitle: Flexible. Charming. Artistic.
ISFP.description: As an ISFP (Adventurer), you're a true artist who explores life through your aesthetics and experiences.

ESTP.title: Entrepreneur
ESTP.subtitle: Smart. Energetic. Perceptive.
ESTP.description: As an ESTP (Entrepreneur), you're always at the center of the action, living in the moment.

ESFP.title: Entertainer
ESFP.subtitle: Spontaneous. Energetic. Enthusiastic.
ESFP.description: As an ESFP (Entertainer), you love being the center of attention and bringing joy to others.
